        "spotlight": "Third against useful rivals on first two hurdling starts and he ran another promising race when second of 14 at Exeter (2m, good to soft) last month; looked a bit tricky last time but that form puts him firmly in the picture and he would have finished closer but for a bad mistake two out."

      {

        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "P",
        "spotlight": "French bumper winner in April 2024; didn't get very far (fell at first) on hurdling/stable debut in January but he travelled well for a long way when a close second at Exeter (2m, good to soft; hood added) last month; wandered around in closing stages but that was a creditable effort in a big field and he should improve for the experience; respected."
      },

        "spotlight": "Close third at Wincanton (1m7f, good) in the first of his two bumper runs last spring; tailed off on hurdling debut in November but he left that form well behind when a front-running fourth at Wincanton (1m7f, soft) the following month; was beaten around 15l but that was a promising effort in a big field and he's a player if he can find more improvement."

        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Had no trouble justifying favouritism on debut in Cork fillies' bumper on debut last July (good); still looked raw when fourth on heavy ground on her hurdling debut at Navan in November, rallied after losing her place, finished 1 1/4l behind today's rival Cool Native; picked up valuable experience when third in a Listed contest at Thurles; holds a major chance."

        "spotlight": "Debut bumper winner at Galway last October; placed in all three maiden hurdles, including twice at this track (2m-2m2f); down in trip again after finishing second to a Gordon Elliott-trained odds-on chance over 2m5f at Leopardstown; cheekpieces and tongue-tie fitted now; capable of getting in the mix."

        "spotlight": "Point-to-point winner; 0-4 in bumpers, best effort when beaten a short head at Naas in December; winner subsequently placed in a Grade 2 bumper at the DRF; runner-up to an experienced rival on hurdling debut over C&D; this looks like a stronger race, but open to improvement."

        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",

        "spotlight": "Runner-up in a point, and in a 2m Cork bumper last season before finishing in mid-division in a competitive 2m4f mares' bumper at this venue; did not appear again until odds-on favourite for a maiden at Catterick a month ago; failed to threaten a 15l winner; may do better in a stronger-run contest."

        "spotlight": "Won a maiden point at Loughbrickland last season on her fourth start for leading producer Denis Murphy; made a pleasing start over hurdles when third in a 22-runner maiden at Navan in November; her renewal of rivalry with fourth-placed Salsinha could have a big bearing on the outcome."

        "spotlight": "Front-runner who was second over C&D (good) in December and bounced back from being pulled up in the William Hill Hurdle at Newbury (heavy) to make all in four-runner handicap at Newcastle (2m1f, good to soft); has a career-high mark in this hotter race but he did it comfortably last time; could make a bold bid."
      },

        "spotlight": "Won at Huntingdon (2m, soft) in December and has continued in good form, finishing second to Williethebuilder at Kempton (2m, good) then third of 18 in the Imperial Cup at Sandown (2m, soft); solid claims."

        "spotlight": "6yo who has shown improved form this season, winning at Ascot (1m7f, soft) in December then runner-up at Sandown (2m, good); well-beaten fifth in the gruelling William Hill Hurdle at Newbury (2m, heavy) in February; has had a break since and could play a leading role if back to his best."

        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "P",
        "spotlight": "Made the running when winning two novice hurdles in November (2m3f/2m, good); ridden with restraint and pulled hard when failing to threaten in February in his first two handicaps (2m, good to soft/soft); could yet be capable of considerably better for his top yard, and a return to more prominent tactics might be the catalyst for an improved performance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Tashan",
        "jockey": "Harry Cobden",
        "trainer": "Emma Lavelle",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "134",
        "or": "114",
        "form": "11-41P",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "7.8%",
        "fair_odds": "12.80",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+5.8pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Despite failing to settle he showed a good attitude to win a 4yo handicap at Exeter (2m, good to soft) in November; pulled up at Ascot in December but that was his first run on soft going and he bled from the nose; very lightly raced and could be suited by the big-field scenario; retains potential."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Frontier Prince",
        "jockey": "Jonathan Burke",
        "trainer": "Fergal O'Brien",
        "ts": "117",
        "rpr": "137",
        "or": "116",
        "form": "213533",
        "score": "51.4",
        "model_pct": "3.5%",
        "fair_odds": "28.29",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "first_time_gear": [
          "tongue_tie"
        ],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "He needs to find something extra on his last three performances but this novice hurdle winner (good to soft) is now 2lb lower than when third of 15 on handicap debut at Cheltenham (2m, soft) in November, and perhaps he'll be aided by the first-time tongue-tie."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Smart Decision",
        "jockey": "James Bowen",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "129",
        "rpr": "136",

        "score": "51.1",
        "model_pct": "3.0%",
        "fair_odds": "33.15",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.2pp",
        "first_time_gear": [
          "cheekpieces"
        ],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won four of his five starts in 2025 and went close off 1lb higher than today over C&D (good to soft) in January; below par on last two starts but the 2m5f trip then soft ground are possible excuses; no surprise if he bounces back with a good performance in first-time cheekpieces."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Marche d'Aligre",

        "trainer": "Jamie Snowden",
        "ts": "127",

        "fair_odds": "35.53",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "first_time_gear": [
          "cheekpieces"
        ],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up twice in a row at the end of last year (2m, soft) then tailed off at Ascot (2m3f, soft); following wind surgery he took a step back in the right direction at Newbury (2m, good to soft) in February but was still soundly beaten, and very much needs to build on that latest effort."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Williethebuilder",
        "jockey": "Toby McCain-Mitchell(5)",
        "trainer": "Christian Williams",
        "ts": "112",
        "rpr": "138",
        "or": "136",
        "form": "321140",
        "score": "50.8",
        "model_pct": "2.8%",
        "fair_odds": "36.40",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-4.6pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won two in a row at Kempton (2m, good) in the winter before another good run when fourth at Musselburgh (1m7f, good to soft), where he would have been a bit closer but for late interference; soft ground may not have been ideal in the County Hurdle three weeks ago; might not be far away."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,

        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Novice who won three times in the autumn (2m, good to soft/good) and ran well when third behind two unexposed rivals at Stratford (2m, soft) last month; a strong pace seems likely, which should see him to good effect."
      },
      {

        "spotlight": "Ex-French 5yo who won a maiden hurdle easily at Catterick (1m7f, good) on New Year's Day on his third British start; however, soundly beaten in two handicaps since (2m3f/2m1f, good to soft) and others appeal more."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Came good over hurdles at seventh attempt, with wide-margin success at Musselburgh (1m7f, good to soft) in February, and was not discredited when clear second under penalty at Newcastle (2m1f, good to soft) a few days later; not yet proven over this far but remains of strong interest."

        "spotlight": "Outran 150-1 odds when placed in novice hurdle here (2m1f, soft) last month, his fifth hurdling start, but jumped poorly and was safely held in Sedgefield handicap (2m1f, good) two days later; effectively 7lb higher today and comes with risk; cheekpieces refitted."

        "spotlight": "Point-to-point winner won Clonmel maiden hurdle last year and some decent efforts in defeat in graded races; 0-5 chasing but decent placings including here in November and last month at Limerick when only weakening late in finishing third in 2m4f handicap; cheekpieces now added."

        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won Grade 3 novice hurdle and Grade 2 novice chase, both 2m6f Limerick mares' events; last season's highlight was a second in C&D Mares' Listed Novice; below best in three runs this term although latest second to classy Dinoblue in 4-runner 2m Opera Hat Chase at Naas was a solid effort over an inadequate trip; drops in class and top-weight respected despite conceding lots of weight all round."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Me Wee Bonnie Lass",
        "jockey": "Patrick M O'Brien(5)",
        "trainer": "Gavin Cromwell",
        "ts": "134",
        "rpr": "147",
        "or": "116",

        "model_pct": "6.5%",
        "fair_odds": "15.30",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "3-7 over hurdles but not the same level a chaser after eight attempts, okay run in 2m5f Cheltenham mares handicap in December, most recently chased home a ready 9l winner in similar Navan contest in February; 3lb wrong here so improvement needed."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark over fences when easy winner of 2m4f Limerick Listed handicap at Christmas (soft-to-heavy); out of frame in competitive Leopardstown handicaps twice since, most recently running well for long way and may have got a bit closer but for mistake last; drops in grade, one to consider."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won mares' beginners' at Wexford in 2024, her sole win over fences from 11 attempts; fine comeback run on yard debut when clear second in 2m2f Thurles handicap in February, despite being badly hampered by leader's fall at the last; didn't seem to stay this trip at Leopardstown last month so stamina concerns."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "ts": "108",

          "cheekpieces"
        ],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won this race last year off 4lb lower mark (soft) in first-time blinkers and good comeback run early this term in Galway Blazers; seen just twice since, well held here in November and 3m looked beyond her at Leopardstown over Christmas; doesn't come here in the same form as last year and cheekpieces now replace blinkers."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Four-time winner over hurdles; 0-9 over fences but has been set some stiff tasks this season; lots to find with Kilbarry Saint on recent Clonmel running and 4lb out of handicap."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,

        "spotlight": "Sole win came in 2m4f novice handicap hurdle here last season; best of five attempts chasing this term when fair fifth (Mystical Goddess third) in 2m5f mares' handicap here in November; pulled up latest two outings so caution advised; 1lb wrong."
      },

        "spotlight": "Won 2m5f Thurles mares' beginners' chase in 2022 for Henry de Bromhead; only six runs since then, including fourth behind Kiltealy Park in this race last year, absent since pulled up behind several of these here in November; hard to fancy on return, especially given she's 6lb wrong here."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Haydock",

    "runners": [
      {

        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Made a solid start to hurdling career on good ground; second on handicap debut at Newbury in November and went one better next time in taking fashion at Wetherby (again about 3m on soft) in February; raised 7lb but it's easy to think he has significantly more to give."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "FAV_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won three in a row last April-June (about 2m7f, good) and resumed her progress with convincing wins at Catterick (3m1f, good) in November and Haydock (3m, good to soft) one month ago; raised another 6lb and in grade but such a progressive mare cannot be dismissed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "fair_odds": "5.95",

        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "FAV_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Given wind surgery before handicapping on last three starts, on last two winning at Ascot (2m7f) in December and Doncaster (3m, again good to soft; from I Am Max) three weeks ago; the latter was by 7l from the front, since which he's been handed an 8lb rise but this 7yo retains potential."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Porter In The Park",

        "ts": "137",

        "edge": "+3.0pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Never better than when placed under Cameron Johnstone-Baker at Ascot (2m7f), Kempton (3m, again on good) and Warwick (3m2f, good to soft; behind Super Survivor) on last three outings; a bit extra is needed to win this warm race."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "jockey": "Tom Bellamy",
        "trainer": "Alan King",
        "ts": "137",
        "rpr": "138",

        "score": "59.2",

        "fair_odds": "15.79",

        "edge": "+3.0pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Did well in cheekpieces last year, winning at Worcester (2m7f, good) in May and Aintree (3m, good) in October; not so good behind Super Survivor here (good to soft) in December but a return to form today looks possible for in-form yard; place hopes."
      },
      {

        "trainer": "Tom Lacey",
        "ts": "126",
        "rpr": "139",
        "or": "123",

        "score": "58.8",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.57",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-8.9pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "OS_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won a good-ground maiden last April and two of his three handicaps this winter; latest was in 18-runner race at Ascot (2m7f, good to soft) seven weeks ago in which he travelled well and asserted on the run-in to score by just over 6l; 8lb higher today but more in the tank; major player."
      },
      {

        "edge": "-0.2pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Back in good form this winter, including on last two starts (good to soft) when he prevailed narrowly over C&D in December and battled back for a clearcut win at Warwick (3m2f; from Porter In the Park) four weeks ago; raised another 4lb but the return to a sharper test is more of a worry."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "ts": "131",

        "fair_odds": "34.01",

        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Short-headed on his only start here; won a Hexham chase in October; hasn't done as well since, finishing runner-up to Jakar Du Moulin when returned to hurdling at Doncaster (3m) on latest start but he needs to build on that markedly; stable in good form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "jockey": "Lewis Saunders(5)",
        "trainer": "Olly Murphy",
        "ts": "119",
        "rpr": "146",

        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "6-26 over hurdles, including a win with first-time cheekpieces in this race in 2024 (soft) and he is 1lb lower today; ridden by 7lb claimer last four outings, with a big return to some form on latest (second at Market Rasen) and that has been followed by his second wind operation; cheekpieces (absent on last four starts) return; too well handicapped to be ignored."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Gained both Flat wins on the AW but arguably his best performance in that sphere was when going close here (2m1f, soft) last summer; kept on for respectable third on last month's handicap hurdle debut at Huntingdon (2m4f, good), and the return to this stiffer track ought to suit."

        "spotlight": "Tended to race too freely and showed only minor promise in three novice hurdles (2m3f-2m4f) towards end of 2023; makes handicap debut after mammoth absence and with a hood (worn on bumper debut) refitted; market helpful."

        "spotlight": "Safely held in first two handicaps (3m/2m5f, good) but returned from break with keeping on second here (2m1f, soft) last month and, on that evidence, this move back up in trip looks the right move."

        "spotlight": "Soft-ground point winner who won a maiden hurdle (2m, good to soft) for Fergal O'Brien last January; disappointing in three chase runs for Dan Skelton this winter but she still has low mileage and is on a dangerous mark back over hurdles; needs checking in market for new yard."

          "cheekpieces"
        ],
        "cd": "",

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "11-race maiden who was disappointing at Hereford ten days ago, but she finished runner-up in Exeter handicap (2m2f, good to soft) on her stable debut last month; that form puts her in the picture and first-time cheekpieces could give her a lift."
      },

        "rank": 3,

        "trainer": "Mrs C Williams",

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Thurles maiden hurdle winner in 2024 (2m, soft to heavy); took on strong opposition in a pair of 3m beginners' chases; beaten 33l when fifth of nine finishers on handicap chase debut at Navan (3m, heavy); came good over 2m2f at Limerick; top amateur rider won this in 2022."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won hunter chases last season at this venue and Cork; two point-to-point runs during the autumn campaign well below best; stepped up on previous handicap chase form when second to today's rival Harbour Highway at Leopardstown last month; rider Elizabeth Gale 2-2 on AW at Dundalk this year."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "BF_FAV",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Comfortably justified favouritism at Punchestown last October (2m7f, good to yielding) when returned to fences, adding to his summer hurdles win at Galway; a long way below his best on heavy at Cheltenham in November; better at Leopardstown at Christmas; trainer has saddled the winner of this in two of the last three seasons; Aine O'Connor won it in 2017."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "spotlight": "Point and dual hurdles winner; ordinary chase form; no threat in first-time cheekpieces in 3m4f National Trial at Punchestown; a little better at Leopardstown but needs to find extra; cheekpieces discarded, blinkers tried."
      },
      {

        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won a valuable staying handicap chase at the 2024 Punchestown festival; ordinary form since then, although did well to maintain contact with top-class performers when 66-1 outsider of four at Down Royal on St Patrick's Day; flattered by proximity but the run implies a return to form; rider doing well in point-to-points, 8-22 this season."
      },

        "spotlight": "Navan bumper winner in March 2024; lost form after a promising third in a Leopardstown maiden hurdle last March; weak form over fences until coming good with a Leopardstown defeat of today's rival Lisleigh Lad; 6lb higher now but holds a big chance for last year's winning jockey and multiple champion point-to-point rider Maxine O'Sullivan."

        "spotlight": "Peak rating of 135 over hurdles; won a 3m handicap chase at Down Royal (yielding-to-soft) in January, beating subsequent Ulster National winner Born Braver; in rear the Grand National Trial at Punchestown on latest; could go well if first-time blinkers do the trick; trainer teamed up with rider Charlotte Butler to win this in 2024."

  {

    "runners": [

        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Inconsistent nowadays but ran well in second when facing an impossible mission behind Protektorat at Kelso (2m7f, good to soft) last time; now 5lb lower than when third in the Old Roan Chase at Aintree (2m4f, good to soft) in October and this C&D winner is capable of being involved."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Filanderer",
        "jockey": "Jonathan Burke",

        "ts": "129",
        "rpr": "150",

        "edge": "+5.9pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Pulled up in the Ultima at Cheltenham last month but that was his first attempt at a staying trip and he failed to settle out wide; went to the Festival having won five of his previous six starts (2m3f-2m5f, various ground) and he could bounce back with a big effort now back down in trip and grade."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "The Widdow Maker",
        "jockey": "Dylan Johnston",
        "trainer": "Joe Tizzard",
        "ts": "135",
        "rpr": "146",

        "edge": "+5.8pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "BF_FAV",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won in a small field at Exeter (2m3f, good) last March before 17l sixth in this race (good); he's run well in defeat on both starts this season but needs something extra if he's to come out on top today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Triple Trade",
        "jockey": "Brendan Powell",
        "trainer": "Joe Tizzard",
        "ts": "138",
        "rpr": "149",
        "or": "130",
        "form": "-13134",
        "score": "55.6",
        "model_pct": "9.1%",
        "fair_odds": "10.95",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Two wins this season (2m/2m4f, soft/good) and 10l third behind an 8yo and a 7yo at Cheltenham (2m4f, soft) in January; 20l fourth in another competitive handicap at Newbury (2m4f, good to soft) in February but that form is working out well and he's back against fellow veterans today; chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Le Milos",
        "jockey": "Harry Skelton",
        "trainer": "Dan Skelton",
        "ts": "132",
        "rpr": "149",

        "fair_odds": "12.66",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+4.0pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "BF_FAV",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up in the Stayers' Veterans' Final at Sandown (3m, good) in January two starts ago and he's not ruled out today; however, he's been inconsistent this season and was soundly beaten at Warwick (2m4f, heavy) in February; he may prefer a longer trip than this nowadays; fourth in this last year."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Genois",

        "trainer": "Jonjo & A J O'Neill",

        "rpr": "148",

        "edge": "+0.7pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "OS_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won at Wetherby (2m3f, soft) on Boxing Day before good second there (2m3f, soft) in January, and he returned to winning ways at Exeter (2m3f, good to soft) four weeks ago when clear with Outlaw Tom; this rejuvenated 10yo still has mileage in his mark and is firmly in calculations."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Courtland",
        "jockey": "James Bowen",
        "trainer": "Mickey Bowen",
        "ts": "140",
        "rpr": "147",
        "or": "133",
        "form": "232U24",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "5.9%",
        "fair_odds": "16.88",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "He ran well in defeat in the main last year and is effective when fresh; could give a good account on this first start since December but there's been minimal movement in his mark this season and he may again prove vulnerable in this competitive contest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Outlaw Peter",
        "jockey": "Harry Cobden",
        "trainer": "Paul Nicholls",
        "ts": "130",
        "rpr": "145",
        "or": "134",
        "form": "5-3842",
        "score": "52.5",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.24",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-2.6pp",
        "first_time_gear": [
          "cheekpieces"
        ],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "BF_FAV",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Sent off favourite at Exeter (2m3f, good to soft) four weeks ago and returned to form with 1l second to Genois, finishing clear of the remainder; wears first-time cheekpieces and he's on the shortlist."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Dubai Days",
        "jockey": "Bruce Lynn",
        "trainer": "N W Alexander",
        "ts": "132",
        "rpr": "147",
        "or": "126",
        "form": "U2-481",
        "score": "52.4",
        "model_pct": "4.9%",
        "fair_odds": "20.56",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "OS_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "His last six wins have come in the months of February, March or April and he returned to form to win at Ayr (2m4f, soft) 40 days ago; runner-up in this race two years ago (soft) and won over C&D (good to soft) last February; that latest win reads well and a 4lb rise isn't harsh; possible player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Guard Your Dreams",
        "jockey": "Toby McCain-Mitchell(5)",
        "trainer": "Nigel & Willy Twiston-Davies",
        "ts": "109",
        "rpr": "146",
        "or": "141",
        "form": "4F-21B",
        "score": "49.9",
        "model_pct": "3.0%",
        "fair_odds": "33.70",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-2.6pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Brought down at the first fence in the Plate at Cheltenham last month; made most of the running when winning easily at Warwick (2m4f, heavy) in February and, although now 8lb higher, he was rated higher over hurdles earlier in his career; versatile ground-wise; one to note."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Fugitif",
        "jockey": "Tom Bellamy",
        "trainer": "Richard Hobson",
        "ts": "129",
        "rpr": "145",
        "or": "134",
        "form": "8-5542",
        "score": "49.8",
        "model_pct": "2.9%",
        "fair_odds": "34.64",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "first_time_gear": [
          "tongue_tie"
        ],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Winless since December 2023 and hasn't posed a serious threat this season; however, he was best of the rest behind easy winner Guard Your Dreams at Warwick (2m4f, heavy) last time and continues to drop down the weights; handles various ground; not ruled out in first-time visor (replacing cheekpieces)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Lord Baddesley",
        "jockey": "Sam Twiston-Davies",
        "trainer": "Anthony Honeyball",
        "ts": "144",
        "rpr": "151",
        "or": "125",
        "form": "3-1365",
        "score": "49.6",
        "model_pct": "2.8%",
        "fair_odds": "35.75",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+1.8pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Easily won three-runner handicap at Newbury (2m4f, good) on reappearance; jumped left when 6l third of four at right-handed Ascot (2m5f, good) next time, and his 13l sixth of nine at Newbury (2m4f, good to soft) came in a race that worked out extremely well; heavy going excuses him being tailed off at Warwick and he could go well now back on better ground."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Whistleinthedark",
        "jockey": "Charlie Maggs(3)",
        "trainer": "L J Morgan",
        "ts": "139",
        "rpr": "148",
        "or": "132",
        "form": "-14618",
        "score": "48.9",
        "model_pct": "2.4%",
        "fair_odds": "40.95",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+4.1pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Inconsistent last year but won twice (3m/2m4f, good/soft), those victories coming on the back of respective breaks of 89 and 120 days; may be best caught fresh nowadays so is worth a second look after 113 days off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 14,
        "horse": "Neon Moon",
        "jockey": "Rian Corcoran(7)",
        "trainer": "David Pipe",
        "ts": "131",
        "rpr": "147",
        "or": "130",
        "form": "4514F5",
        "score": "47.2",
        "model_pct": "1.7%",
        "fair_odds": "58.03",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "He won a four-runner handicap at Ascot (2m5f, good) in November but has failed to kick on subsequently, proving no match for Genois and Outlaw Peter when fifth at Exeter (2m3f, good to soft) four weeks ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 15,
        "horse": "The Flier Begley",
        "jockey": "Benjamin Macey(5)",
        "trainer": "Gary Hanmer",
        "ts": "101",
        "rpr": "149",
        "or": "132",
        "form": "1-1P72",
        "score": "46.1",
        "model_pct": "1.4%",
        "fair_odds": "72.49",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-5.4pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won this last year (good) and followed up at Market Rasen (2m5f, good) in June off a mark 1lb higher than today's; pulled up/tailed off over fences on next two starts but his recent outing over hurdles was fairly encouraging and he could build on that now back chasing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 16,
        "horse": "Numitor",
        "jockey": "Richie McLernon",
        "trainer": "Heather Main",
        "ts": "106",
        "rpr": "146",
        "or": "134",
        "form": "1P-PP4",
        "score": "44.9",
        "model_pct": "1.1%",
        "fair_odds": "90.20",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-3.0pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "C&D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Pulled up in this race last year and same outcome on first two runs this season; 13l fourth behind Genois at Exeter (2m3f, good to soft) last month following wind surgery and a break but he could improve for that outing, and he won this race in 2024; not written off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 17,

        "jockey": "Ciaran Gethings",
        "trainer": "P J Rothwell",

        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Irish challenger who could be in the picture judged on his good form at Killarney last summer, and he's one to watch in the betting; however, he's been soundly beaten on his last three starts and has to get back on track."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Long in the tooth now but won here (3m2f, soft; refitted cheekpieces) in the autumn and was placed over C&D (good to soft) on last two appearances, more recently when keeping on to snatch modest second in higher-grade company; ought to make his presence felt again."

        "spotlight": "Low-mileage 7yo who scored on seasonal/handicap/chase debut at Uttoxeter (2m4f, good to soft) in November and arguably bettered that performance when a close second at Exeter (3m, good to soft) last month; still unexposed at around 3m; leading contender."

        "first_time_gear": [],

        "sp_flag": "FAV_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Was beginning to look a lost cause but suddenly struck form with wins at Leicester (2m4f, heavy) and Warwick (3m, soft) in February; this race looks more competitive but further progress is possible if the forecast quicker ground suits."
      },

        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "P",
        "spotlight": "Has mixed record over fences this season but was seemingly aided by first-time cheekpieces at Ffos Las (3m, heavy) in February, where he looked sure to win when nicely clear inside the final furlong but idled and was mugged close home; also suited by much quicker ground; no surprise if he goes well again."

        "spotlight": "Soft-ground 2m4f point winner who landed a valuable Kelso bumper for this yard; off the mark over hurdles on third attempt when taking Newcastle maiden (2m1f, good to soft) in January but pulled up on handicap debut at Haydock (2m3f, good to soft) last month; drops back in distance here and warrants another chance."

  {
    "course": "Newton Abbot",
    "time": "3:49",

    "type": "chase",
    "dist": "21.0f",
    "going": "Good To Soft",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Calimystic",
        "jockey": "Nico de Boinville",
        "trainer": "Nicky Henderson",
        "ts": "122",
        "rpr": "134",
        "or": "128",
        "form": "21P-11",
        "score": "62.9",
        "model_pct": "49.8%",
        "fair_odds": "2.01",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "+0.5pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "FAV_WIN",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Very lightly raced 7yo; record of 1-3 over hurdles and he's won at Newbury (2m6f, good) and Sandown (3m, soft) in his two chase runs this winter; up another 6lb but he travelled strongly on his penultimate run and is open to more progress on this drop back in trip; big player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Bumpy Evans",
        "jockey": "Conor O'Farrell",
        "trainer": "Kerry Lee",
        "ts": "122",
        "rpr": "139",
        "or": "125",
        "form": "-11F12",
        "score": "59.9",
        "model_pct": "22.0%",
        "fair_odds": "4.55",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "BF_FAV",
        "run_style": "FR",
        "spotlight": "Front-runner who is 5-8 over fences and he found more progress when runner-up in the Durham National (3m5f, good) in October; this is a different test on his return but he still looks on a workable mark and was successful over 2m4f last spring; has worn a hood in all of his chase runs but the headgear is missing today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Royal Jewel",
        "jockey": "Callum Pritchard(3)",
        "trainer": "Philip Hobbs & Johnson White",
        "ts": "119",

        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won over C&D (good to soft) in the autumn and he got back on the scoresheet at Taunton (2m7f, heavy) in February; ran another good race when third at Taunton (good) last month and he should be in the mix again on this drop back in trip."
      },

        "spotlight": "Had form figures of 23243221 last year and he was as good as ever when scoring at Wincanton (2m4f, good) in November; has won when fresh in the past but he's 7lb higher than last time and this is highly competitive on his return."
      },

        "spotlight": "Hurdle winner who made it second time lucky over fences with an easy win at Exeter (2m2f, good to soft) last month; this is much tougher off 9lb higher but that was a clear personal best last time and he could have a lot more to offer as a chaser."

        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Four-time chase winner and his last success was in this race (off 2lb lower) last year; has been in and out this season but he bounced back with a fair third in Class 2 handicap at Newbury (2m4f, good to soft) two weeks ago; has possibilities if he can back that up and he's versatile ground-wise."
      },

        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Won over hurdles in November and has done well on his belated return to fences, following a near-miss at Carlisle with a creditable third at Newbury (2m, good to soft) in February; still looks feasibly treated and he was a dual chase winner (2m/2m4f) in his youth; dangerous back up in trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "sp_flag": "OS_PLACED",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Pulled up on all four starts last year but he turned things around with a rallying second at Windsor (2m6f, soft; first-time blinkers) in January; 2lb higher after a break but he remains well treated on old form and this return to quicker ground should be fine; possibilities."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Walk In The Park gelding easily won a Boulta maiden in November for Ian McCarthy; runner-up won his next start and now bumper-placed in Britain, third-placed Desertmore News has won twice over hurdles in Britain; might have been expected to do better when third in a bumper at Thurles; remains a good prospect."

        "spotlight": "Successful twice over 2m4f at Hexham (good) this season; bounced back from a couple of poor runs when third of 13 at Carlisle (2m4f, good to soft) 13 days ago but his rather in-and-out record of late suggests he's no good thing to back that up."

        "spotlight": "Added to his strong chase record at Exeter with a win over the extended 2m1f there (good to soft) in January; just as good when runner-up over 2m4f on heavy at Wincanton since; bold show likely off the same mark."

        "spotlight": "Evidently not the force of old but he built on an encouraging C&D reappearance when winning in first-time cheekpieces at Catterick (2m3f, soft) in February; made early mistakes when a disappointing favourite at Hereford since but it's possible he'll be happier back on a left-handed course and likely he's still on a winnable mark if putting his best foot forward."

      }

        "spotlight": "French bumper winner; reportedly bled from the nose when well held in Hereford maiden hurdle in December and left that behind with a hood added (retained) when springing a 33-1 surprise in a Sedgefield maiden hurdle (2m1f, good) three months later; that form will need improving upon to defy this opening mark but his unexposed profile provides hope."

        "spotlight": "Kilbeggan bumper winner a year ago on good ground; has raced on contrasting ground so far hurdling, notably second to a smart mare at Punchestown and most recently nicely improved when running away with albeit weaker 2m7f maiden at same venue in February (soft-to-heavy); should make his mark in handicaps and opening mark looks competitive."
      },

        "spotlight": "Point and debut bumper winner returned from a 619-day absence in December, coming good at third attempt with much improved effort in 2m6f Navan maiden in late February (heavy) under positive ride; every chance he'll stay this longer trip and should go well but Townend prefers Fillyoureye."

        "spotlight": "Runner-up on first three runs in maidens before landing 2m4f Punchestown contest in February, making all for clear-cut success (third has won since); unlikely to get such a soft lead here and possible stamina concerns on handicap debut."

        "spotlight": "Bolted up in weak Thurles maiden in January (2m6f, heavy) and much better form month later in 2m4f handicap here, asserting from last to win snugly on similar ground; hit with 11lb rise so needs to improve again but quite likely."

        "spotlight": "Point-to-point winner last season off the mark hurdling in 2m Limerick maiden in February (heavy), making all to beat a long odds-on favourite and subsequent winner emphatically; clear second to an all-the-way winner in 2m Navan novice following month when conceding plenty of weight; type to make his mark in handicaps and good chance he'll improve for this step up in trip; cheekpieces added."

        "spotlight": "Backed at big prices when scoring on hurdling debut at Gowran (2m, heavy) and best run yet on handicap debut over 2m7f at Punchestown in February, having to wait going to last but finishing his race out strongly on similar ground to win going away (third has won both chase starts since); 5lb rise looks workable, should go well."

        "spotlight": "Completed a hat-trick in November (2m5f/2m4f, good-soft) and bounced back from Sedgefield blip to win at Catterick (2m3f, soft) in January; only a respectable fourth at Wetherby next time but has been eased 2lb since."

        "spotlight": "Came good with hard-fought success on seasonal return here (2m1f, soft) in November and has built on that in two Ayr outings since, winning over an extended 2m4f on soft last time; a further 8lb rise demands another career best but he has to be respected in his current mood."

        "spotlight": "Won four in a row over hurdles in Ireland in May-July 2024; down in weights and first sign of promise since coming to Britain when third of 14 over 2m5f at Kelso (good to soft) 14 days ago; well treated if he can build on that."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "sp_flag": "",

        "spotlight": "Hasn't really built on his hurdle debut fourth in three further outings around 2m but this 3m Irish point winner has the profile of a likely improver now handicapping over a longer trip; gets the vote for in-form stable, with confidence increased should the betting vibes be strong."

        "spotlight": "Back-to-back winner over 2m1f here in November 2024 and confirmed her liking for the track when third over 2m1f last month; however, while returning here is clearly a good thing, she did finish last at Musselburgh two weeks ago; the cheekpieces she's worn the last twice are left off (usual tongue-tie remains)."

        "spotlight": "Out of a half-sister to three bumper winners but she made a low-key start at Wincanton (1m7f, good to soft; 28-1) in February and was a long way behind Guste's Dance; passed over."

  },

        "spotlight": "Smart novice hurdler last season (placed in Grade 1s) and, although defeated at short odds, produced a career-best RPR when second in 2m Naas Grade 3 (heavy) on return from nine months off; beaten favourite in County Hurdle latest but steady pace and not clear run didn't suit so sixth of 23 was a solid run in the circumstances; Townend's pick."

        "spotlight": "Nicely improved on fifth attempt hurdling to land 2m Navan novice last month, making all in beating Tip Of The Wings (runs in 4.25) 6l in first-time tongue-tie; unlikely he'll be able to dominate in same way here but progressive and opening mark seems okay."

        "spotlight": "Off the mark in 4yo C&D handicap in February (heavy) and better again when a clear second to a strong favourite in 2m1f Limerick conditions event last month on similar ground under today's rider, conceding plenty of weight; 1lb wrong but could go well off light weight."

        "spotlight": "In good form last year for Shane Nolan and better again this year in cheekpieces, backing up Down Royal success with decisive 2m2f Leopardstown success last month under hold-up tactics; up an aggregate of 19lb so more needed from 2lb out of handicap but in such good form has to be respected."

        "spotlight": "Grade 1-winning juvenile hurdler last season; sustained an injury over the summer and has posted decent RPR's in three defeats since returning at Christmas, latest when 10th of 23 in County Hurdle after not clear run (only 1l behind Karbau); more needed but don't rule out."

        "spotlight": "Most consistent since chasing debut, twice making the frame over C&D (good to soft/soft) and again running creditably when a close third of six at Wincanton (3m1f, heavy); hard to knock and should be thereabouts again."

        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Had two subsequent winners behind when justifying favouritism at Galway on debut in August (2m1f, good); stiffer task since in Listed mares' events on much softer ground, decent third at Gowran and front-running third to a warm favourite at Navan (second narrowly beaten in Grade 2 afterwards), racing a bit keen; entitled to be thereabouts, especially if settling better."

        "spotlight": "Off the mark at fourth attempt when allowed to dictate at Punchestown in December (yielding); out of depth in Grade 2 mares' event at DRF since; more exposed than several of these."

        "sp_flag": "",

        "spotlight": "Off the mark in second bumper, nicking it before the home turn at Tramore in August (good); two months later didn't get home as well over 2m3f at Cork when third; back from winter break with hood fitted; probably wants better ground."
      },
      {

        "first_time_gear": [],
        "cd": "D",
        "sp_flag": "",
        "run_style": "UNKNOWN",
        "spotlight": "Did well to beat some the geldings on debut in Goffs Defender Bumper at Punchestown a year ago (2m, yielding) but has run nowhere near that level in both starts since on softer ground, dropping out tamely at Huntingdon and never sighted in Grade 2 at DRF in February; sets the standard on her Punchestown form but hard to be confident in on recent efforts."

        "spotlight": "Sister to winning hurdlers Coco Kolada (2m1f) and Long Draw (2m4f/3m); long-absent until staying-on second to front-running Kiltybo at Thurles in February (soft-to-heavy) but beaten a lot further by same rival at Naas following month, having been held up in a steadily-run affair; may yet improve, especially in a truly-run race."

        "spotlight": "Landed his second win over hurdles on his reappearance at Carlisle (2m1f, good) in October and ran well on his next three starts; pulled up at Haydock last month but was in the process of running a good race when falling two out at Sedgefield (2m1f, good) 16 days ago in first-time cheekpieces (retained); decent ground looks to be the key and he should run well."
